## Efficiency Review Findings

### Real Issues

**1. `worn-paths.ts` — redundant key construction in hot path**
`getWornLevel` (called per visible tile every animation frame at 60fps) constructs the string key `\`${String(tileX)},${String(tileY)}\`` from scratch on every call. `drawWornPaths` already iterates over tiles and calls `getWornLevel` for each one — both functions build the same key independently.
